title: Python Notes CLI
description: Create a tiny stdlib notes CLI plus a README inside the disposable sandbox project.
task_card:
# TASK CARD

Build a small stdlib Python notes CLI inside this sandbox project.

Requirements:
- Read this task card first.
- Create `notes.py` with `add_note`, `list_notes`, and `main` functions.
- Persist notes to `notes.json`.
- Create `README.md` with short usage instructions.
- Do not modify `_docs/TASK_CARD.md` or `_docs/BCC.md`.
- Keep all work inside this sandbox project root.
